name: Sugar-Crusted Meltaways
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F.
2. In a small bowl, combine orange peel and orange juice; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, cream together sugar, salt, margarine or butter, water, and vanilla.
4. Lightly spoon flour into a measuring cup; level off.
5. Stir in flour, chocolate chips, and nuts; mix well.
6. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls.
7. Place the dough balls on ungreased cookie sheets, about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes or until firm but still slightly soft.
9. Remove from the cookie sheets and allow to cool completely.
10. Strain orange juice mixture through a fine-mesh sieve.
11. Dip cooled cookies into orange juice.
12. Roll each cookie in sugar to coat evenly.
13. Allow the cookies to dry for a sugar shell, about 30 minutes.
14. Serve 3 and a half dozen cookies.
